feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2002 201 1801 91
PT 1717 144 1573 17

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: BreatheIn: Calm Breathing
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：8,99 € → 0,99 € [0,49 € ~ 8,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Application Description

Feeling overwhelmed by the chaos of life? Find your peace and vitality with BreatheIn, the app that helps you unlock the power of mindful breathing. Rediscover Calm and Energy Deep, mindful breathing is the key to a calm mind and a vibrant body. With BreatheIn, immerse yourself in guided exercises that harmonize your body and mind, leading to true balance and renewal. Expertly Curated Practices We've handpicked and tested each exercise to ensure you get the best. Start your journey toward a healthier, more fulfilled life today! Seamless Apple Health Integration Track your progress effortlessly—BreatheIn automatically syncs with Apple Health, making it easy to monitor your wellness journey. Explore a Range of Techniques - Square Breathing (4-4-4-4): Regain control and calm your mind. - Relax Breathing (4-7-8): Beat anxiety and fall asleep faster. - Bee Breathing: Soothe your mind with this relaxing technique. - Coherent Breathing: Improve your well-being through HRV enhancement. - Transform Your Life, One Breath at a Time Conquer stress, boost your resilience, and rediscover balance with every breath. Download BreatheIn now and take the first step toward a more vibrant, peaceful you!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 完蛋！我被美女包围了！2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Compras integradas

  • 解锁全部角色剧情：3,99 €
  • 解锁当前角色剧情：0,99 €
  • 陆明月弹幕：0,99 €
  • 柳施施弹幕：0,99 €
  • 苏清儿弹幕：0,99 €
  • 阿宁弹幕：0,99 €
  • 谢筱筱弹幕：0,99 €
  • 谢珂弹幕：0,99 €
  • 解锁章节：6,99 €

Application Description

一场灭门惨案，将你的人生彻底改写。作为幸存者，是隐姓埋名选择另一种人生，还是卧薪尝胆查出真相？商贾小姐、异邦花魁、神秘刺客甚至名门贵女，这些女子又与当年的案件有什么关系？迷雾重重之中，唯一清楚的是，通向未来的选择权在你的手中。 恋爱互动影游《完蛋！我被美女包围了！》系列正统新作，转换时空，抛却现代的桎梏，携六位佳人，共度一场跌宕起伏的古典浪漫冒险之旅。

entry.title: Way of the Hunter Wild America
entry.id: Way of the Hunter Wild America-pt-1779319139246
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 6,99 € [4,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：6,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Hunter's Pack：1,99 €
  • Steyr Arms Pack：2,99 €

Application Description

Aproveite a primeira entrada da série móvel Way of the Hunter, ambientada no belo noroeste do Pacífico norte-americano. Esta experiência de caça autêntica deixa você caçar e explorar ambientes abertos enormes nos Nez Perce Valleys dos Estados Unidos. Encontre animais realistas em belos habitats naturais e utilize diversas réplicas detalhadas de armas. Way of the Hunter oferece uma experiência altamente imersiva e integrada, com vida selvagem deslumbrante e comportamento realista dos grupos de animais. Testemunhe as transformações em ecossistemas complexos, que reagem e se adaptam ao que você fizer. Aprenda a caçar de verdade e ponha suas habilidades à prova. Enfrente os desafios da caça ética com uma história cativante, ou simplesmente divirta-se caçando em ambientes deslumbrantes. * Dezenas de espécies incrivelmente detalhadas com comportamentos realistas para proporcionar uma experiência de caça verdadeiramente imersiva. * Cace como um profissional com recursos que destacam sinais de animais e analisam respingos de sangue. Analise a trajetória dos seus disparos com a câmera rebobinável. * Use seu sentido de caçador para destacar detalhes e informações importantes, ou desative-o. * O complexo sistema de troféus gera chifres exclusivos com base em vários fatores, como estado físico e idade das caças. * Animações e reações de animais naturais e sofisticadas ao sentir a presença dos jogadores. * Ciclos de dia e noite com 24 horas, além de vento e clima variáveis. * Simulação realística de balística e de física de projéteis. * Grande seleção de armas de fogo e equipamentos, incluindo itens licenciados das empresas Bushnell, Federal, Leupold, Primos, Remington e Steyr Arms. * A economia do jogo permite a você caçar e vender a carne para comprar mais equipamentos, licenças de caça e serviços de taxidermia para seus troféus. * Uma história cativante sobre os obstáculos enfrentados por uma empresa familiar de caça e a rivalidade e amizades que a cercam. * Modo de fotografia intuitivo, para capturar e compartilhar seus momentos favoritos. * Rastreie a sua presa usando ou o gamepad ou os controles de toque * Controle otimizado e eficiente para dispositivos móveis AVISO: Dispositivos com menos de 4 GB de RAM não são suportados! Necessita de um dispositivo com pelo menos 6 GB de RAM para utilizar as definições gráficas mais elevadas. Editora: http://www.handy-games.com/contact/ © www.handy-games.com GmbH

entry.title: Dungeon and Puzzles
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

-- Awards: ● 2021 BitSummit THE 8th BIT: Official Selection ● Busan Indie Connect 2020: Excellence in Casual ● Bahamut 2020 ACG Creation Contest: Bronze Award About: Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves. There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms. To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move. Features: ● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban ● 150 handcrafted rooms ● Fantasy themed pixel art ● Non-linear dungeon map -- ● Follow us on Twitter https://twitter.com/nekolyst ● Like us on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/Nekolyst ● Join our Discord server https://discord.gg/A7Sss9d

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Evoland 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Application Description

What were your childhood games like? Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references. From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored. “Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology. Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices. « It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat “Evoland 2 manages to seamlessly blend an incredible number of genres into a single, wonderful experience.” 4/5 – Hardcoregamer Compatible with MFI controllers. If you experience any problem with Evoland 2, please contact our customer support at hello@playdigious.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Bass Modes Symmetry School
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：19,99 € → 14,99 € [14,99 € ~ 19,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：14,99 €

Application Description

If you love music and want to master your bass guitar in perfection like Richard Bona, Stanley Clarke, John Patitucci, Billy Sheehan, Victor Wooten, Gary Willis, or even better, then you just need to have this app!!! Demo video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LPNsS2F6bs This app is a great collection of bass guitar modes, that gives you an excellent original material for improvisations and solo on the bass! Bass Modes Symmetry School is a triple horizontal system, in which modes are played with three notes on each string. Today many progressive bass guitarists use the wide extended fingering instead of usual traditional. This school presents "horizontal-extended" fingering, that helps you to perform modes in 1-2 octaves bound. The material in this school is also irreplaceable if you want to master a shredding bass technique. The app will be useful as for beginners, so for professionals! ●●●●● Bass Modes Symmetry School features: -------------------------------------- - 3-notes-per-string approach works perfectly for bass - Easy learning of modes - Ability to achieve fast performance speed (●SHREDDING●) - Theoretical and practical usage for guitar, bass and piano players - Given material works best with jazz but also can be used for latin, pop, funk, rock, etc. - This school will work for a beginner as well as for intermediate and advanced players. ●●●●● App Features: ------------------ ● 322 + 23 (new) types of different bass modes, which can be easily transposed, resulting in about 3,800 of total modes! ● Harmony feature: you can see and listen to the chords, over which given modes can be played. More information about these chords you can find in our "International Guitar Chords 1 & 2" apps ● Every mode is provided with corresponding optimal fingerings for your comfort ● Transpose modes to any desired key by dragging notes on the screen with your finger ● Metrotone with adjustable tempo and time signature can be used as a trainer ● 5 different Metrotone click sounds at your choice ● Cursor can display note names or fingering (selectable) ● Notes can display note names or fingering (selectable) ● Sharp and flat signatures correspond to the current mode's key ● Fast cycled playback of modes with adjustable tempo ● Slow step-by-step playback of modes for easier learning ● Six selectable harmony timbres to choose from ● Stereo Chorus FX for harmony chords at your choice ● Reverb effect, applied to bass guitar and harmony (adjustable) ● designed both for iPhone and iPad ● iOS 10 and up compatible For support and full documentation on this and other our products please visit our website: ---------------------------------- http://www.fonexsis.com ---------------------------------- With respect, Fonexsis Creative Group.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Afinador de Violoncelo Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：14,99 € → 9,99 € [Gratuito ~ 14,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：9,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Diapasão：1,99 €
  • Configurações：1,99 €

Application Description

Afine o seu violoncelo instantaneamente com facilidade e precisão! · Incrivelmente preciso: Apresenta a frequência exata em Hertz. · Calibração de A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Carrega instantaneamente - O único afinador otimizado para 64 bits. · Maior capacidade de resposta e sensibilidade. · Indicador visual - a corda afinada acende. · Interface de usuário intuitiva com LED indicador de afinação. · Aplicação universal. --- Comentários? Dúvidas? Por favor, envie seus comentários através do nosso site ou: feedback@daikyoujulabs.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Happy Game :)
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Um garotinho adormece com um pesadelo terrível. Você consegue fazer com que ele volte a ficar feliz? - Nova aventura de horror psicodélico - Enfrente e escape de três pesadelos inesquecíveis - Resolva enigmas profundamente inquietantes em locais (des) encantadores - Lide com coelhinhos rosas e carinhas sorridentes suspeitas - Berros e músicas assustadoras de DVA, uma banda tcheca de freakfolk

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Machinarium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Machinarium é o premiado jogo de aventura independente desenvolvido pelos criadores de Samorost, Botanicula e CHUCHEL. Ajude o robô Josef a salvar sua namorada Berta, sequestrada pela gangue Blackcap Brotherhood. Absolutamente fantástico - TouchArcade 4/4 - USA TODAY 4/4 - SlideToPlay 9/10 - Pocket Gamer Prêmios: - IGF, Excellence in Visual Art Award - Gamasutra, Best Indie Game Of The Year - VGChartz.com, Best Indie Game Of The Year

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Halls of Torment: Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Supporter Pack：0,99 €
  • The Boglands DLC：2,99 €

Application Description

Halls of Torment é um jogo de sobrevivência contra hordas com um visual retrô pré-renderizado, reminiscente dos RPGs dos anos 90. Escolha um dos muitos personagens heróis e desça aos Mortais Salões da Tormenta. Lute contra horrores profanos do além e sobreviva a onda após onda de inimigos até enfrentar um dos Senhores atormentados. Fortaleça seu herói com características, habilidades e itens. Crie uma nova construção poderosa a cada partida. Explore diversas expansões subterrâneas e encontre novos itens poderosos que permitem aventurar-se ainda mais no abismo. Primeiramente disponível no Steam, o roguelike RPG de sobrevivência estilo anos 90, Halls of Torment, agora faz sua estreia no mobile! 【Características】 ◆ Corridas rápidas e casuais de 30 minutos ◆ Estilo de arte pré-renderizado à moda antiga ◆ Progressão meta baseada em missões ◆ Grande seleção de habilidades, características e itens diversos, permitindo criar sinergias interessantes ◆ Chefes diversos com mecânicas e padrões de ataque únicos ◆ Vários personagens distintos que permitem diferentes estilos de jogo ◆ Desbloqueie e explore vários mundos subterrâneos interessantes e desafiadores ◆ Itens únicos podem ser enviados para o mundo superior e usados para personalizar futuras partidas ◆ Crie tinturas mágicas para direcionar o destino a seu favor ◆ Desbloqueie o poder de cada classe e combine-os com o personagem escolhido ◆ Encontre variantes raras de itens para melhorar ainda mais suas construções 【Lista Completa de Conteúdo】 ◆ 6 níveis com ambientes únicos ◆ 13 personagens jogáveis e marcas de personagem ◆ 20+ bênçãos para te fortalecer em cada partida ◆ 80+ itens diferentes para obter e desbloquear ◆ 240 variantes mais raras de itens ◆ 80+ habilidades e melhorias de habilidade ◆ 40+ artefactos para personalizar a tua jogabilidade ◆ 35+ bosses únicos ◆ 70+ monstros únicos ◆ 500+ missões a concluir ◆ 1000+ aptidões que melhoram personagens e habilidades Nossa lista de conteúdo ainda está crescendo, espere mais no futuro! 【Entre em Contato】 Discord: @Erabit ou entre via https://discord.gg/Gkje2gzCqB Email: prglobal@erabitstudios.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: where I put it
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search! Do you have trouble Looking for items? Find your item quickly with "where I put it”! Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings. Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Afinador de Violoncelo Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Diapasão：5,99 € → 1,99 € [0,00 € ~ 5,99 €]
  • Configurações：5,99 € → 1,99 € [0,00 € ~ 5,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：14,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Diapasão：1,99 €
  • Configurações：1,99 €

Application Description

Afine o seu violoncelo instantaneamente com facilidade e precisão! · Incrivelmente preciso: Apresenta a frequência exata em Hertz. · Calibração de A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Carrega instantaneamente - O único afinador otimizado para 64 bits. · Maior capacidade de resposta e sensibilidade. · Indicador visual - a corda afinada acende. · Interface de usuário intuitiva com LED indicador de afinação. · Aplicação universal. --- Comentários? Dúvidas? Por favor, envie seus comentários através do nosso site ou: feedback@daikyoujulabs.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Horas Planetárias
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

As horas planetárias são baseadas em um sistema astrológico antigo, a ordem caldeu dos planetas. As horas planetárias são controladas pelos 7 planetas visíveis do sistema solar. Na ordem caldaica, os planetas são organizados na seguinte sequência: Saturno, Júpiter, Marte, Sol, Vênus, Mercúrio e Lua. Cada planeta controla a hora, que pertence a ele de acordo. Todo planeta tem suas próprias características e energia individuais, que se mostram claramente durante a hora associada. Considerando as esferas de influência planetária, assuntos particulares, implementados em determinadas horas planetárias, saem para melhor ou para pior. Escolha um momento favorável para fazer seus planos, considerando as horas do planeta, e você permanecerá bem-sucedido e feliz!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Little Nightmares
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：8,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 8,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Application Description

Fuja dos seus medos de infância Disponível primeiramente para PC e consoles, o conto de aventuras de terror Little Nightmares agora está disponível para dispositivos móveis! Mergulhe em Little Nightmares, um conto sombrio e extravagante que confrontará você com seus medos de infância! Ajude Six a escapar da Bocarra, um navio vasto e misterioso habitado por almas corrompidas em busca da próxima refeição. Conforme você avança na jornada, explore a casa de bonecas mais perturbadora que oferece uma prisão de onde fugir e um parquinho cheio de segredos para descobrir. Reconecte-se com sua criança interior para soltar a imaginação e encontrar a saída! Little Nightmares apresenta uma mistura sutil de ação, mecânica de plataforma e quebra-cabeças enraizada em uma direção artística misteriosa e design de som assustador. Esgueire-se para fora do labirinto sombrio da Bocarra e fuja dos habitantes corrompidos para fugir dos seus medos de infância. RECURSOS - Ande com cuidado em uma aventura obscura e emocionante - Redescubra seus medos de infância dentro de uma embarcação assombrada e escape dos habitantes misteriosos dela - Escale, rasteje e esconda-se em ambientes horripilantes para solucionar enigmas difíceis de plataforma - Mergulhe na Bocarra com o design de som assustador REDESENHADO CUIDADOSAMENTE PARA DISPOSITIVOS MÓVEIS - Interface nova - Conquistas do Game Center - iCloud - Compartilhe o progresso entre dispositivos iOS - Compatível com controles MFi Fuja dos seus medos de infância Caso tenha algum problema, entre em contato conosco em https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/12-playdigious/ com o máximo de informações possível sobre o problema.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Road to Empress I
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • total chapter：14,49 € → 13,90 € [13,90 € ~ 14,49 €]
  • road to empress I：6,89 € → 5,89 € [5,89 € ~ 6,89 €]

All Price Information

Price：0,90 €

Compras integradas

  • Jade Seal - Golden Era：4,95 €
  • total chapter：13,90 €
  • road to empress II -- purchased：8,69 €
  • road to empress II：10,49 €
  • road to empress II -- cost：9,59 €
  • road to empress I：5,89 €
  • 64800 eggs -- empress：99,99 €
  • 12800 eggs -- empress：22,99 €
  • 32800 eggs -- empress：59,99 €
  • 6800 eggs -- empress：9,99 €

Application Description

This work requires a constant internet connection. The full content consists of all 16 chapters, including chapters 1-2 (already purchased) and chapters 3-16 which need to be purchased to unlock. You've never played anything like this before—Road to Empress I, a cinematic palace challenge where your move shapes the palace drama! Full 4K Live-Action Star-Studded Performance Watch real drama unfold through the eyes of talented actors performing on lavishly crafted sets. Featuring Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo, Hana Lin, Zi Yu, Qi Xiaxia, and an ensemble cast who bring the imperial court to life in breathtaking 4K detail. Everything has been meticulously recreated to pull you deep into the heart of ancient China's most glorious palace. Your Choices Shape History This is where film meets gaming in perfect harmony. Every choice matters. One moment of misplaced trust could send you spiraling into betrayal and death. Who's manipulating you? Who can you manipulate in return? Survive to Rule Rising from obscurity to ultimate power out of multiple deadly story branches takes cunning, charm, and wisdom. The crown awaits... if you live long enough to claim it. Uncover the Palace's Darkest Secrets Behind the golden facade of the imperial court lies a web of forbidden desires, deadly conspiracies, and buried truths. The Prince's secret affair with the court bard, the Princess's hidden lover, the vengeful spirits haunting the abandoned Cold Palace... Every scandal of the ancient dynasty awaits your discovery. Multiple Playthroughs With over 8 hours of cinematic content, no two playthroughs are alike. Your choices don't just change the story; they define who you become. Earn a personalized Trait Sketch based on your decisions, collect beautiful traditional artifacts, unlock hidden storylines, and crown your favorite characters in global popularity contests! About New One Studio We are an independent creative team focused on crafting full-motion video experiences that blend Eastern culture with interactive storytelling. Our goal is to create immersive experiences that cross cultural boundaries. In 2019, The Invisible Guardian received BAFTA recognition and connected with millions through its non-linear narrative and deep exploration of moral choices. Now we return with "Road to Empress," weaving the ancient dynasty legends into an interactive experience that bridges cultures and centuries. Step into our world of palace intrigue, where ancient wisdom meets modern storytelling, and every choice echoes through history. Inspired by the ancient dynasty legends, we create Road to Empress I. Chapters 1-16 dive into the empress's legendary beginnings. Watch an unknown girl proceed with caution in palace crawling with enemies, using extraordinary wit and remarkable courage to outlast brutal power struggles, slowly making her name. These are the most nail-biting years—calm before storm, plotting rise while staying under radar. Every move sets stage for her ultimate climb to power pyramid's top. More chapters under development. Stay tuned! YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@roadtoempressen Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/ X: https://x.com/roadtoempressen Discord: https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

entry.title: Tokyo Train!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 0,49 € [0,29 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,49 €

Application Description

Façam os comboios japoneses funcionar! Não é necessário nenhum conhecimento ferroviário para jogar "Tokyo Train!". Este jogo é um jogo de cérebro com regras simples, mas requer muito poder cerebral. Os clientes esperam na estação que os comboios cheguem para os levar aos seus destinos. Comece os comboios e transporte os seus clientes. Ganharão dinheiro por cada passageiro que embarcar num comboio. Ajuste o intervalo entre as viagens e o número de vagões para alcançar a maior receita. A partida dos comboios custa dinheiro. Se enviar demasiados comboios e a taxa de embarque baixar, perderá as suas receitas. O método de operação é muito fácil e as regras são simples. Só tem de ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem na melhor altura. À medida que o jogo avança, as tarifas expressas também aparecerão. Não é necessário qualquer conhecimento técnico. Tanto as pessoas que gostam de comboios como as pessoas que gostam de jogos podem rapidamente compreender e desfrutar do jogo. Não há compras em espera. Não há anúncios. Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo. Partilhe os seus resultados operacionais nas redes sociais.

entry.title: Clank!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：11,99 € → 7,99 € [7,99 € ~ 11,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：7,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Sunken Treasures：9,99 €
  • Mummy's Curse：9,99 €

Application Description

Aventure-se roubando no premiado jogo de tabuleiro! Uma nova aventura começa! "Clank!, o icônico jogo de aventura de tabuleiro de construção de baralho desafia os ladrões ousados a se infiltrarem no covil do dragão, roubar um de seus preciosos artefatos e escapar antes de virar churrasco! Juntando mais fãs e prêmios ao redor do mundo, Clank! é um dos mais amados jogos de tabuleiro moderno com muitas expansões e adaptações para a diversão dos jogadores." O quão fundo você irá se aventurar? "Quanto mais fundo for, mais valiosos serão os tesouros que encontrar... mas será mais difícil ainda escapar! Então seja breve e não faça barulho: Um passo em falso e CLANK! Cada barulho pode chamar a atenção do dragão. Você está competindo contra seus amigos ladrões para reivindicar o prêmio mais valioso... mas você só terá o saque se conseguir escapar das profundezas com vida!" Escolha seu caminho "Você vai precisar de um bom par de botas, uma espada afiada e todas suas habilidades de ladino para sobreviver na masmorra. Ao longo do caminho, você irá adquirir novos itens, perícias e aliados para te ajudar a conquistar a vitória! Misturando construção de baralho e exploração, Clank! oferece uma aventura de exploração de masmorra única a cada vez que jogar." Diversas formas de jogar "Aprenda a usar as cordas no tutorial guia e aprimore suas habilidades ao coletar conquistas e concluir desafios. Jogue em multiplataforma com os amigos ou compita em novos e empolgantes Assaltos que colocam você contra jogadores de todo o mundo! Seja como for que você entrar na masmorra: boa sorte... você vai precisar!"

entry.title: Dune: Imperium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：11,99 € → 7,99 € [7,99 € ~ 11,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：7,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：9,99 €
  • Dune: Imperium - Immortality：9,99 €

Application Description

Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium! Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal. Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader. Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning. Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same! Control the Spice. Control the Universe. Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it. Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Ark Nova
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：11,99 € → 8,99 € [8,99 € ~ 11,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：8,99 €

Application Description

Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game. In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans. Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are: BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions. ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo. CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards). ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks. SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money. With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

entry.title: Root Board Game
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 5,99 € [3,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：5,99 €

Compras integradas

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：9,99 €
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：9,99 €
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：8,99 €
  • The Clockwork Expansion：6,99 €
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：9,99 €
  • Hirelings & Landmarks：9,99 €

Application Description

Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness. The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods. Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright. The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
